articles.title: Bombay high court dismisses PIL seeking recovery of Mohan Bhagwat’s Z-plus security cost; questions plea’s intent
articles.description: The Bombay High Court has dismissed a Public Interest Litigation demanding recovery of Z-plus security costs for RSS chief Mohan Bhagwat. The court questioned the motive behind the plea, which argued that public funds were misused for an "unregistered" organization. The petitioner cited a Supreme Court ruling on industrialist Mukesh Ambani's security costs being borne by his family.
